name: NGS Practice Environment
postCreateCommand: echo "alias minimap2='docker run --rm -v $(pwd):/workspaces/${localWorkspaceFolderBasename}:/data staphb/minimap2:latest minimap2'" >> ~/.bashrc && echo "alias samtools='docker run --rm -v $(pwd):/workspaces/${localWorkspaceFolderBasename}:/data biocontainers/samtools:v1.9-4-deb_cv1 samtools'" >> ~/.bashrc && echo "alias varscan='docker run --rm -v $(pwd):/workspaces/${localWorkspaceFolderBasename}:/data mgibio/varscan:v2.4.2 varscan'" >> ~/.bashrc
